text: .hero-search-image-group>img{--clamp-vw:1vw;border-radius:1rem;position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);height:auto}@media (max-width:991px){.hero-search-image-group>img{border-radius:.5rem}}@media (min-width:1920px){.hero-search-image-group>img{--clamp-vw:calc(1920px * 0.01)}}.hero-search-image-group>img:first-child{margin-top:-180px;margin-left:-41vw;width:calc(14 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}@media (max-width:767px){.hero-search-image-group>img:first-child{margin-top:-190px;margin-left:-34vw;width:100px}}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(2){margin-top:330px;width:calc(17.8 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}@media (max-width:767px){.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(2){margin-top:130px;margin-left:37vw;width:68px}}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(3){margin-top:-110px;margin-left:43vw;width:calc(19.5 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}@media (max-width:767px){.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(3){margin-top:160px;margin-left:-37vw;width:162px}}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(4){margin-top:-160px;margin-left:-13vw;width:calc(6.5 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}@media (max-width:767px){.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(4){margin-top:-160px;margin-left:37vw;width:120px}}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(5){margin-top:330px;margin-left:40vw;width:calc(6 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}@media (max-width:767px){.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(5){margin-top:-105px;margin-left:-2vw;width:68px}}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(6){margin-top:-178px;margin-left:25vw;width:calc(6.7 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}@media (max-width:767px){.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(6){margin-top:235px;margin-left:10vw;width:80px}}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(7){margin-top:220px;margin-left:-33vw;width:calc(19.5 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(8){margin-top:170px;margin-left:26vw;width:calc(12 * var(--clamp-vw,1vw))}.hero-search-image-group>img:nth-child(9){margin-top:-310px;margin-left:-24.2vw;width:calc(9.5 * .eye{pointer-events:none;transform:rotateZ(attr(data-rotation deg,0deg));transition:transform 1s ease-out}.eye:not(.furious,.angry,.shocked){cursor:pointer;pointer-events:auto}.eye *{pointer-events:none}.eye .eye-inner-scale{clip-path:ellipse(3.25rem 3.25rem at 50% 50%);transform:rotateZ(calc(-1 * attr(data-rotation deg,0deg)))}.eye:not(.furious,.angry,.shocked):hover .eye-inner-scale{transform:rotateZ(calc(-1 * attr(data-rotation deg,0deg))) scale(1.05)}.eye.angry .eye-inner-scale{transition:transform 2s ease-out;transform:rotateZ(calc(-1 * attr(data-rotation deg,0deg))) scale(1.1)}.eye.furious .eye-inner-scale{transition:transform 2s ease-out;transform:rotateZ(calc(-1 * attr(data-rotation deg,0deg))) scale(1.15)}.eye-inner-scale{transition:transform .5s ease-out}.eye.angry .eye-inner-translate{--shake-amount:2%;animation:shake .1s infinite}.eye.furious .eye-inner-translate{--shake-amount:3%;animation:shake 80ms infinite}.eye-iris{transition:background-color .4s ease-out}.eye.furious .eye-iris{background-color:red;transition:background-color .4s ease-out}@keyframes flicker{0%{opacity:0}100%{opacity:1}}@keyframes shake{0%{transform:translateX(0)}25%{transform:translateX(calc(-1 * var(--shake-amount,5%)))}75%{transform:translateX(var(--shake-amount,5%))}100%{transform:translateX(0)}}.eye-pupil{clip-path:ellipse(50% 50% at 50% 50%);transition:transform .5s ease-out}.eye.angry .eye-pupil,.eye.shocked .eye-pupil{opacity:0}.eye.furious .eye-pupil{transition:transform 2s ease-out;transform:scale(1.05)}.eye-cross{background-image:url('data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xml:space="preserve" width="800" height="800" viewBox="0 0 503.021 503.021"><path d="m491.613 75.643-64.235-64.235c-15.202-15.202-39.854-15.202-55.056 0L251.507 132.222 130.686 11.407c-15.202-15.202-39.853-15.202-55.055 0l-64.23 64.236c-15.202 15.202-15.202 39.854 0 55.056l120.821 120.815L11.401 372.328c-15.202 15.202-15.202 39.854 0 55.056l64.235 64.229c15.202 15.202 39.854 15.202 55.056 0l120.815-120.814 120.822 120.814c15.202 15.202 39.854 15.202 55.056 0l64.235-64.229c15.202-15.202 15.202-39.854 0-55.056L370.793 251.514l120.82-120.815c15.202-15.209 15.202-39.854 0-55.056z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>');background-position:50% 50%;background-size:contain;opacity:0;transition:transform .33s ease-out}.eye.shocked .eye-cross{animation:flicker .1s linear infinite alternate}.eye.angry .eye-cross{animation:flicker .2s linear 1 forwards}
